description.value: A rate-limit-aware wrapper around gh: it classifies each call into a budget bucket, gates it before spending, and records an audit trail.  GitHub's API has several distinct rate limits (core, search, GraphQL, …).  This package classifies a call into its bucket, checks the rema…
